topics.topic_en: Constitutional Amendment Vote Fails in Assembly
topics.summary: On May 7, a constitutional amendment bill backed by six parties — including martial law restriction clauses and enshrinement of the May 18 Gwangju Uprising — failed to reach the required two-thirds quorum (191 votes) after PPP lawmakers collectively boycotted the plenary session; the National Assembly speaker announced a re-vote attempt for May 8.

evidence_headlines.title: 39년만의 개헌, 국힘 불참에 처리 불발…내일 재시도(종합)
李정부 첫 개헌안 '투표 불성립'…국민의힘 불참(종합)
'계엄 통제 강화' 개헌안, 국회 본회의 '불성립'···국민의힘 불참으로 의결정족수 미달

topics.topic_en: Lee Jae-myung Prosecution Dismissal Special Counsel Bill
topics.summary: The ruling Democratic Party is advancing a special prosecutor bill that could lead to the dismissal of pending charges against President Lee Jae-myung; the PPP staged a rally in front of the presidential office, calling the bill a 'self-pardon' that violates the rule of law, while also launching a public signature campaign against it.

evidence_headlines.title: 국민의힘, 靑 앞서 최고위 개최...장동혁 '공소취소 특검으로 李 독재 시작'
李대통령 공소취소 특검 반대 국민 서명운동 사이트 안내
송언석 '이재명, 공소취소 특검 공식화…조삼모사 사기극' 비판

topics.topic_en: June 3 Local Elections Campaign Heats Up
topics.summary: With the nationwide local elections one month away, polls show the Democratic Party with a commanding lead across most regions including traditionally conservative Daegu, drawing comparisons to the 2018 blowout; the PPP is struggling to mount a competitive campaign amid leadership instability and low national approval.

evidence_headlines.title: [MBC여론조사] 이 대통령 지지율, 서울·부산·대구 60% 넘겨‥대구는 '견제론' 팽팽
다양한 지방선거 기사를 만나보세요
2026년 6월 지방선거 판세 재편, 권력지도 재편 분수령·3가지 핵심 변수

topics.topic_en: PPP Leadership Crisis Under Jang Dong-hyeok
topics.summary: PPP leader Jang Dong-hyeok faces intensifying calls to resign from pro-Han Dong-hoon factions ahead of the local elections, with critics accusing him of lacking leadership and rumored 2027 presidential ambitions; the intra-party rift is widely seen as undermining the party's electoral prospects.

evidence_headlines.title: 장동혁 사퇴론 확산, 버티는 張…지방선거 코앞 혼돈의 국힘
국힘 박정하 '장동혁, 친한계 징계 시사? 전혀 두렵지않아... 대선 출마한다더라'

topics.topic_en: Han Dong-hoon Busan By-Election Independent Run
topics.summary: Former PPP leader Han Dong-hoon has officially registered as an independent candidate in the Busan Buk-gu Gap by-election running alongside the June 3 local elections, creating a three-way race against DP candidate Ha Jeong-woo and PPP's Park Min-sik; polls show Han trailing in a three-way contest but posing a spoiler threat.

evidence_headlines.title: 한동훈 부산북갑·조국 평택을‥미니 총선 출마 윤곽
한동훈 부산 북구갑 출마, 친한계 지원 채비… 국힘 '무공천 안 돼'
하정우 38% 박민식 26% 한동훈 21%…양자대결 묻자 [여론조사]

topics.topic_en: Yoon Suk-yeol Insurrection Trial Approaching Verdict
topics.summary: Former President Yoon Suk-yeol's primary insurrection trial (1st instance) is scheduled to deliver its verdict on May 28; separately, an appellate court in late April upgraded his sentence on arrest-obstruction charges to seven years, and special prosecutors have filed additional indictments on related counts.

evidence_headlines.title: 2026년 5월 윤석열 체포방해 항소심 결과·형량·판단 근거 3가지
윤석열 내란 재판/전개

topics.topic_en: Lee Jae-myung Presidential Approval Remains High
topics.summary: President Lee Jae-myung's approval rating has held at 61.9% for five consecutive weeks according to Realmeter surveys, supported by economic stabilization signals and energy security measures; the Democratic Party's party support stands at 50.6% versus the PPP's 30.0%.

evidence_headlines.title: 이 대통령 지지율 5주 연속 60%대‥민주 50.6%·국민의힘 30.0% [리얼미터]
이 대통령 지지율 65.5% 취임 후 최고‥민주당 50.5%·국힘 31.4%

topics.summary: Cho Kuk, leader of the Rebuilding Korea Party, has declared his candidacy in the Pyeongtaek-eul by-election concurrent with the June 3 local elections, framing his run around completing prosecutorial reform; the race is drawing national attention as a test of progressive coalition politics.

evidence_headlines.title: 조국, 경기 평택을 재선거 출마 선언…'與 무공천이 책임정치'(종합)
조국 '평택을 보선, 평택 혁신과 검찰개혁 완수에 중대한 영향 미칠 선거'
'대선 후보감이 왜 여기에?' '당선 확률 엄청 높죠'...평택을 민심이 본 조국 출마

method_notes: Captured via Anthropic API (Sonnet 4.6) with web_search for live Korean political coverage. Topic labels (topic_en) are stable handles for cross-snapshot rank comparison.
